claims.fact: Among the most difficult problems in knowledge representation are the breadth of commonsense knowledge [28] and the sub-symbolic form of most commonsense knowledge (much of what people know is not represented as facts or statements they can express verbally).[14] There is also the difficulty of knowledge acquisition, the problem of obtaining knowledge for AI applications.[c]

claims.fact: In classical planning, the agent knows exactly what the effect of any action will be.[34] In most real-world problems, however, the agent may not be certain about the situation it is in  and it may not know for certain what will happen after each possible action .

claims.fact: Mitchell provided a widely quoted,[citation needed] more formal definition of the algorithms studied in the machine learning field: A computer program is said to learn from experience E with respect to some class of tasks T and performance measure P if its performance at tasks in T, as measured by P, improves with experience E.[15] This definition of the tasks in which machine learning is concerned is fundamentally operational rather than defining the field in cognitive terms.

practical.centralIdea: where What Is Artificial Intelligence? shows up — a subset of machine learning

claims.fact: Artificial intelligence[edit] Deep learning is a subset of machine learning, which is itself a subset of artificial intelligence.[20] As a scientific endeavour, machine learning grew out of the quest for artificial intelligence .
claims.subject: Artificial intelligence[edit] Deep learning

assessment.fact: Artificial intelligence[edit] Deep learning is a subset of machine learning, which is itself a subset of artificial intelligence.[20] As a scientific endeavour, machine learning grew out of the quest for artificial intelligence .

claims.fact: The agent learns to choose responses that are classified as good.[46] Transfer learning is when the knowledge gained from one problem is applied to a new problem.[47] Deep learning is a type of machine learning that runs inputs through biologically inspired artificial neural networks for all of these types of learning.[48]

summary.mainIdea: Machine learning is a field of study in artificial intelligence concerned with the development and study of statistical algorithms that can learn from data and generalize to unseen
summary.centralIdea: essential takeaway — machine learning is a field of study in artificial intelligence concerne

claims.fact: Machine learning  is a field of study in artificial intelligence concerned with the development and study of statistical algorithms that can learn from data and generalize to unseen data, and thus perform tasks without being explicitly programmed.[1] Advances in the field of deep learning have allowed neural networks, a class of statistical algorithms, to surpass many previous machine learning approaches in performance.

assessment.fact: Machine learning  is a field of study in artificial intelligence concerned with the development and study of statistical algorithms that can learn from data and generalize to unseen data, and thus perform tasks without being explicitly programmed.[1] Advances in the field of deep learning have allowed neural networks, a class of statistical algorithms, to surpass many previous machine learning approaches in performance.
